greengrass.resourcedefinitionversion.res.Description: A descriptive or arbitrary ID for the resource. This value must be unique within the resource definition version. Maximum length is 128 characters with pattern `[a-zA-Z0-9:_-]+`.
The descriptive resource name, which is displayed on the AWS IoT Greengrass console. Maximum length 128 characters with pattern [a-zA-Z0-9:_-]+. This must be unique within a Greengrass group.

A container for resource data. The container takes only one of the following supported resource data types: `LocalDeviceResourceData`, `LocalVolumeResourceData`, `SageMakerMachineLearningModelResourceData`, `S3MachineLearningModelResourceData`, or `SecretsManagerSecretResourceData`.  Only one resource type can be defined for a `ResourceDataContainer` instance.
